title: Exact pool and category actual conservation
description: Every active spend transaction is either assigned to one active Spend Pool or exposed in an explicit unassigned-pool bucket, and to zero or one direct Spend Category independently. Transfers contribute zero External Spend to all pools and categories. Category exact and subtree roll-ups use the current acyclic hierarchy and never duplicate a transaction. Linked refunds and reversals offset the original current pool/category in their own Effective Date period. Corrections, statement-authoritative replacements, hierarchy moves, and relationship changes update exact current actuals atomically without overwriting history.
